and calculated as of the end of the calendar year, or, 
for beneficiaries that died during the year, age as of the date of death. 

LONG NAME: AGE_AT_END_REF_YR 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) (derived) 

VALUES: X–XXX 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable, and sets the maximum value to 115 (years).
